decisions.decision: EARS patterns as HTML comments in template
decisions.rationale: Keeps template clean while providing pattern reference to agents — comments are invisible in rendered markdown but visible to the LLM reading the file
Design specified checkboxes as optional derivative of EARS; implemented as separate section agents can include or skip based on simplicity principle

decisions.decision: Used H3 headings for drift checks instead of H4 with Check N: prefix
decisions.rationale: Heading-level markers prevent substring collision in validators (Gap 13). H4 Check N: naming was verbose and the prefix added no semantic value.

decisions.decision: Reconcile mode requires canAskInteractive: true; audit works on all platforms
decisions.rationale: Audit is read-only and produces a report regardless of platform. Reconcile makes destructive edits to tasks.md and must confirm each repair — requires interactive input.

decisions.decision: All-specs audit targets status != completed instead of all specs
decisions.rationale: Completed specs are frozen — auditing them for staleness would always produce false Warnings. Only active specs need drift detection.

decisions.decision: Used step 3.5 notation instead of renumbering Phase 1 steps
decisions.rationale: Other modules (memory.md) reference step 4 by number; renumbering would break those references

decisions.decision: Did not add core/repo-map.md to CLAUDE.md security-sensitive files list
decisions.rationale: Follows same non-sensitive pattern as core/steering.md and core/memory.md which are also not in that list

decisions.decision: Changed validation marker from lowercase 'implementation gate' to title-case 'Implementation gate'
decisions.rationale: Phase 3 restructure changed 'Check the implementation gate:' to '**Implementation gates**', breaking the lowercase marker. The review module's '### Implementation Gate' still contains the title-case form.

decisions.decision: Added || true to grep in verify_file for set -e compatibility
decisions.rationale: grep -F returns exit code 1 when no match found, which fails under set -e pipefail. The || true ensures missing checksum entries produce a warning instead of aborting

decisions.decision: SKILL.md becomes dispatcher, monolithic preserved as SKILL.monolithic.md
decisions.rationale: Backward compatibility: old installs work with monolithic; new installs get dispatcher + modes

decisions.decision: Mode file paths use RUN_COMMAND with cat fallback for both skill directories
decisions.rationale: Mode files install alongside SKILL.md; Read tool needs actual installed path, not project-relative path

decisions.decision: Audit artifact template defined inline in core/dependency-safety.md, not in core/templates/
decisions.rationale: generator/generate.py auto-loads ALL core/templates/*.md into _templates dict — adding a file there would cause it to be loaded as a spec-type template

decisions.decision: DEPENDENCY_SAFETY_MARKERS added to both validate_platform() and cross-platform consistency loop in same commit
decisions.rationale: Gap 31 pattern — markers must be in both locations to avoid validator/consistency check mismatch

decisions.decision: Used nested hooks schema (matcher + hooks array with type: command) instead of flat matcher + command
decisions.rationale: Claude Code settings.json schema validation requires entries in hooks.PostToolUse to have a hooks array of typed hook objects, not a flat command string
